title: Blowout preventer with ram packer assemblies with support member
abstract: A blowout preventer ("BOP") includes a housing comprising a vertical bore extending through the housing and ram cavities intersecting the bore and ram assemblies, each ram assembly movably positionable within a ram cavity. Each ram assembly includes a packer assembly that comprises an upper plate, a lower plate, an elastomeric body positioned between the upper plate and the lower plate and comprising elastomeric material, and a support member comprising an aperture and positioned between the upper plate and the lower plate to provide support to the ram assembly.
claims: Claims Claims  What is claimed is: 1. A blowout preventer ("BOP"), comprising: a housing comprising a vertical bore extending through the housing and ram cavities intersecting the bore; ram assemblies, each ram assembly movably positionable within a ram cavity, each ram assembly comprising a packer assembly comprising: an upper plate; a lower plate; an elastomeric body positioned between the upper plate and the lower plate and comprising elastomeric material; and a support member comprising an aperture and positioned between the upper plate and the lower plate to provide support to the ram assembly. 2. The BOP of claim 1, wherein the support member is configured to increase a hang-off capacity for the ram assembly up to about 1,500,000 lbf (about 680,400 kg-force). 3. The BOP of claim 1, wherein the support member extends between the upper plate and the lower plate. 4. The BOP of claim 3, wherein the support member comprises a front planar face with the aperture formed within the front planar face. 5. The packer assembly of claim 4, wherein the support member comprises a support block. 6. The BOP of claim 1, wherein the aperture comprises an enlarged opening. 7. The BOP of claim 1, wherein the support member is removably coupled to at least one of the upper plate and the lower plate. 8. The BOP of claim 7, further comprising a dowel that is receivable within a hole to removably couple the support member to the at least one of the upper plate and the lower plate. 9. The BOP of claim 1 , wherein the support member comprises an attachment member configured to removably couple the packer assembly to the ram. 10. The BOP of claim 1, wherein the upper plate, the lower plate, and the elastomeric body each comprise a curved inner surface. 11. The BOP of claim 1, wherein the packer assembly further comprises: another support member positioned between the upper plate and the lower plate; the first support member positioned adjacent one end of the upper plate and the lower plate and the other support member positioned adjacent another end of the upper plate and the lower plate; and the other support member comprising another aperture configured to receive the elastomeric material at least partially therein. 12. A packer assembly for ram assembly of a blowout preventer ("BOP"), the packer assembly comprising: an upper plate; a lower plate; a body comprising an elastomeric material that is positioned between the upper plate and the lower plate; and a support member comprising an aperture and positioned between the upper plate and the lower plate to provide support to the ram assembly. 13. The packer assembly of claim 12, wherein the support member is configured to increase a hang-off capacity for the ram assembly up to about 1,500,000 lbf (about 680,400 kg-force). 14. The packer assembly of claim 12, wherein the support member extends between the upper plate and the lower plate. 15. The packer assembly of claim 12, wherein the support member comprises a support block including a front planar face with the aperture formed within the front planar face. 16. The packer assembly of claim 12, wherein the support member is removably coupled to at least one of the upper plate and the lower plate. 17. The packer assembly of claim 12, wherein the upper plate, the lower plate, and the elastomeric material each comprise a curved inner surface. 18. The packer assembly of claim 12, further comprising: another support member positioned between the upper plate and the lower plate; the first support member positioned adjacent one end of the upper plate and the lower plate and the other support member positioned adjacent another end of the upper plate and the lower plate; and the other support member comprising another aperture configured to receive the elastomeric material at least partially therein. 19. A method of manufacturing a packer assembly for a ram assembly of a BOP, the method comprising: providing a mold with desired dimensions for the packer assembly; inserting an upper plate, a lower plate, and a support member comprising an aperture into the mold such that the support member is positioned between the upper plate and the lower plate; injecting an elastomeric material into the mold; and curing the elastomeric material to form the packer assembly. 20. The method of claim 19, further comprising: inserting a place holder into the aperture before inj ecting the elastomeric material into the mold to prevent elastomeric material from entering the aperture when forming the packer assembly.
